translation.time_to_complete_hm: Isikhathi sokuqeda: {{hours}} amahora kanye nemizuzu engu-{{minutes}}
translation.pleaseListenToAudio: Sicela ulalele umsindo kuze kube sekupheleni.
translation.youWillHaveToCompleteIt: Uzoba namahora angu-{{hours}} imizuzu engu-{{minutes}} ukuyiqeda.
translation.yourWorkWillBeSubmitted: Umsebenzi wakho uzothunyelwa ngokuzenzakalelayo uma isikhathi siphela.
translation.common_loading_error: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle ngesikhathi kufakwa idatha :(
translation.wrondLinkParametrError: Ufinyelele le URL ngephutha. Sicela uthinte umhleli wale applet ukuze uthole usizo olwengeziwe.

autoCompletion.title: Icubungula izimpendulo
autoCompletion.description: Sicela ulinde futhi ungaluvali i-app. Izimpendulo zakho ziyacutshungulwa.
autoCompletion.processCompleted: Izimpendulo zakho zicutshunguliwe. Manje ungavala ikhasi.
autoCompletion.restartActivityWarning: Awukwazi ukuqala kabusha inhlolovo ngoba isikhathi siphelile. Sicela uyiqhube futhi uhambise izimpendulo zakho.

dialog.body: Ukwabelana ngezimpendulo esidlangalaleni kusho ukuthi ulwazi olunikezwa abasebenzisi ngabanye, njengezimpendulo zenhlolovo noma impendulo, luzotholakala ngokusobala ukuze abanye balubuke.

timesupModal.title: Isikhathi Siphelile
timesupModal.description: Asisekho isikhathi sokusebenza kulo msebenzi. Wonke umsebenzi owenzile uzogcinwa futhi uhanjiswe.

validation.passwordMinLength: Iphasiwedi kufanele okungenani ibe izinhlamvu ezingu-{{chars}}.
validation.passwordCharacterTypes: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani iqukathe okuthi {{types}} kokuthi: usonhlamvukazi, uhlamvu oluncane, inombolo, uphawu..
validation.passwordMustInclude: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani iqukathe izinhlamvu ezingu-{{minLength}}, azikho izikhala, futhi okungenani okuthi {{types}} koku-4 kokungezansi:
validation.passwordMustIncludeMinimum: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani iqukathe izinhlamvu ezingu-{{minLength}} futhi kungabikhona izikhala.
validation.passwordReqCharTypesHeading: Okungenani okuthi {{types}} kulezi zinhlobo ezi-4 ezingezansi
validation.mfaCodeFormat: Ikhodi yokuqinisekisa kufanele ibe namadijithi ayi-6.
validation.recoveryCodeFormat: Ikhodi yokutakula kufanele ibe ngefomethi ethi XXXXX-XXXXX.

MFA.enterVerificationCode: Sicela ufake ikhodi yokuqinisekisa eboniswe ku-app yakho yokufakazela ubuqiniso.
MFA.cantAccessAuthenticator: Angikwazi ukufinyelela i-app yami yokufakazela ubuqiniso
MFA.mfaSessionExpired: Isikhathi sakho siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela ungene futhi.
MFA.tooManyAttempts: Imizamo eminingi kakhulu ehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.

transferOwnership.notFound: Ilinki yokudlulisa ubunikazi ayivumelekile noma asisasebenzi.

accepted.title: Ubunikazi Bumukelwe
accepted.message1: I-Applet manje isikubunikazi bakho futhi iyafinyeleleka kokuthi Ideshibhodi yakho.
accepted.message2: Ukuze uqale ukusebenza nge-Applet, ngena kokuthi

declined.title: Ubunikazi Bunqatshiwe
declined.message2: Uma lokhu bekuyiphutha, sicela uthinte umnikazi we-Applet umcele ukuthi aqale ukudlulisa futhi.

invitation.notAssociatedAccount: Lesi simemo asihlobene ne-akhawunti ongene kuyo manje. Sicela ungene ku-akhawunti ehambisana ne-imeyili othole kuyo isimemo.

inviteContent.title: Umenyiwe ukuthi ube okuthi {{role}} kokuthi
inviteContent.toAccept: Ukuze wamukele lesi simemo, chofoza ngezansi:
inviteContent.description: Ngemva kokuthi wamukele isimemo, uzokwazi ukufinyelela {{displayName}} ku-app yamahhala ye-Curious kudivayisi yakho yeselula, uma ulandela izinyathelo ezintathu ezilula (bona umhlahlandlela womsebenzisi ukuze uthole imininingwane eyengeziwe):
inviteContent.step1: Faka i-app ye-Curious kudivayisi yakho yeselula, uma lungakafakwa.
inviteContent.step2: Vula i-app ye-Curious kudivayisi yakho yeselula, bese ungena ngemvume
inviteContent.step2_1: (uma une-akhawunti ye-Curious) noma bhalisa (uma umusha ku-Curious). Ukuze ubhalise, thepha okuthi “Umsebenzisi Omusha” esikrinini sokungena ngemvume, bese ufaka ikheli le-imeyili lapho othole khona lesi simemo se-imeyili.
inviteContent.step3: Thepha okuthi {{displayName}} esikrinini sasekhaya se-Curious futhi usulungele ukuhamba! Uma u-{{displayName}} engaveli, qala kabusha isikrini ngokuslayida umunwe wakho uye phansi ukusuka phezulu, futhi isondo elijikelezayo kufanele livele ngenkathi ulayisha. {{displayName}}.
inviteContent.footer: I-Child Mind Institute ingumsunguli we-Curious, inkundla yokusungula ama-applet, kodwa ayinasibopho ngokuqukethwe kwe-applet okudalwe amaqembu angaphandle.
inviteContent.reviewers: Abasebenzisi abangabona idatha yakho yale applet:
inviteContent.managers: Abasebenzisi abangakwazi ukushintsha amasethingi ale applet, okuhlanganisa ukuthi ubani ongafinyelela idatha yakho:
inviteContent.coordinators: Abasebenzisi abangakwazi ukushintsha amasethingi ale applet, kodwa abangakwazi ukushintsha ukuthi ubani ongabona idatha yakho:

Login.title: Ngena ngemvume
Login.errorMessage: Iphasiwedi engalungile uma lowo msebenzisi ekhona.
Login.passwordResetSuccessful: Iphasiwedi yakho isethwe kabusha ngempumelelo. Sicela ungene ngemvume ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.

SignUp.title: Yenza i-akhawunti
SignUp.signUpError: Ukubhalisa kuhlulekile. I-imeyili kungenzeka isivele iyasetshenziswa.

ChangePassword.title: Sungula Iphasiwedi Entsha
ChangePassword.invalidLink: Le linki ayivumelekile noma iphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela uchofoze lapha ukusetha kabusha iphasiwedi yakho.

Landing.title: Siyakwamukela ku-Curious
Landing.reserchStudies: Bamba iqhaza ezifundweni zocwaningo lwesayensi ku-inthanethi!

Profile.title: Dawuniloda i-Curious ukukhulekela.
Profile.description: Siyabonga ngokusungula i-akhawunti ne-Curious. Dawuniloda i-Curious kudivayisi ye-iOS noma ye-Android ukuze uqalise.

SetPassword.expiredLink: Ilinki Yephasiwedi Ethunyelwe Kabusha Iphelelwe Isikhathi
SetPassword.passwordShort: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu eziyisi-6

additional.activity_resume_restart: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukusula konke ukuqhubeka bese uqala kabusha
additional.activity_already_completed: Kwenziwe! Le nhlolovo bese iqediwe kakade kudivayisi ehlukile.
additional.flow_deleted_body: Lokhu kugeleza komsebenzi kususwe umlawuli. Usengaqhuba futhi uqedele ukuqhubeka kwakho okukhona.
additional.terms_text: Ngiyaqonda ukuthi ulwazi oluhlinzekwe yilolu hlu lwemibuzo akuhloselwe ukuthatha indawo yeseluleko, ukuxilongwa, noma ukwelashwa okunikezwa uchwepheshe wezempilo noma wengqondo, nokuthi izimpendulo zami ezingaziwa zingasetshenziswa futhi kwabelwane ngazo ukuze kwenziwe ucwaningo olujwayelekile mayelana nempilo yengqondo yezingane.
additional.footer_text: I-CHILD MIND INSTITUTE, INC. FUTHI UKWELASHWA KOMQONDO WENGANE, I-PLLC (NDAWONYE, “I-CMI”) AYISEBENZI NGEMITHI NGOKUQONDILE NOMA NGOKUNGAQONDILE NOMA IKHIPHE ISELULEKO SOKWELAPHA NJENGXENYE YALE MIBUZO. I-CMI AYITHATHI ISIBOPHO SOKUHLOLA, UKWELASHWA, ISINQUMO ESENZIWE, NOMA ISINYATHELO ESITHATHWE NGOKUTHEMBA ULWAZI OLUNIKEZWE NGALOLU LWEMIBUZO, FUTHI AYIQINISEKI ISIBOPHO NGOKUSEBENZISA KWAKHO LE MIBUZO.
additional.child_score_on_subscale: Isikolo sengane yakho esikalini esingaphansi se-{{name}} besithi

translation.no_markdown: Ababhali bale applet abanikezanga noma yiluphi ulwazi!

takeNow.invalidRespondent: Awugunyaziwe ukuqedela lokhu kuhlola egameni lalesi sihloko.
takeNow.mismatchedRespondent: Kukhona ukungafani phakathi komphenduli olindelekile kanye nomsebenzisi we-app ongene ngemvume. Sicela ungene ngemvume njengomphenduli olungile ukuze uqhubeke nokuthi Thatha Manje.
takeNow.successModalLabel: Izimpendulo zakho zithunyelwe. Sicela ubuyele ku-App Yomlawuli ukuze uqedele omunye umsebenzi noma ubuke imiphumela.

translation.targetSubjectBanner: Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi zonke izimpendulo zakho zimayelana {{name}}
translation.noActivities: Ayikho imisebenzi etholakalayo ukuthi uyiqedele njengamanje

prolific.nocode: Kwenzeke iphutha ngesikhathi kulandwa ikhodi yakho yokuqedela ku-Prolific. Siyaxolisa ngalokhu kuphazamiseka Sicela usebenzise okuthi "NOCODE" ku-Prolific njengekhodi yakho yokuqedela
prolific.alreadyAnswered: Usuvele uwuphendulile lo msebenzi. Sicela ubuyele ku-Prolific bese uhambisa ikhodi yakho yokuqedela noma ulandele inqubomgomo ye-NOCODE.
prolific.invalid: Ayikwazi ukuqinisekisa ucwaningo. Sicela uthinte umlawuli wocwaningo.

requestHealthRecordData.title: Cela Idatha Yerekhodi Lezempilo
requestHealthRecordData.linkText: Funda kabanzi mayelana nendlela i-Curious efinyelela ngayo ngokuphephile kudatha yokunakekelwa kwezempilo.
requestHealthRecordData.partnershipText:
I-Curious isebenzisa i-1upHealth’s Medical Information Service ukuze umcwaningi wakho akwazi ukufinyelela ulwazi kumarekhodi akho okunakekelwa kwezempilo.

Kuzikrini ezilandelayo, uzocelwa ukuthi ungene ngemvume kumasistimu akho Abahlinzeki Bezempilo futhi wabelane ngedatha yakho yokunakekelwa kwezempilo nalolu cwaningo.. Uzobuyela emsebenzini we-Curious uma usuqedile.
requestHealthRecordData.additionalPromptText:
Usuqedile ukungena ku-akhawunti yakho yokunakekelwa kwezempilo.

Ungathanda ukungena ngemvume kunoma imaphi ama-akhawunti okunakekelwa kwezempilo engeziwe?

translation.announcementBanner: <0>Senza kabusha! </0><1>Izibuyekezo zedizayini zisendleleni — i-app enhle efanayo, ukubukeka okusha. Ufuna ukwazi? </1><2>Chofoza ukuze ufunde kabanzi.</2>

tokenExpired.title: Ithokheni iphelelwe yisikhathi
tokenExpired.message: Lesi sikhathi siphelelwe yisikhathi. Ixhuma kabusha ku-1UpHealth...
tokenExpired.banner: Isikhathi sakho siphelelwe yisikhathi. Izama ukuvuselela...

geographicRestriction.title: Umkhawulo Ongokwendawo
geographicRestriction.message: Lokhu okuqukethwe akutholakali endaweni yangakini. Sicela weqele esinyathelweni esilandelayo.
geographicRestriction.banner: Ukufinyelela ku-1UpHealth okwamanje kukhawulelwe kubasebenzisi abase-United States.

serviceUnavailable.title: Insizakalo Ayitholakali
serviceUnavailable.message: Asikwazi ukuxhuma ku-1UpHealth ngalesi sikhathi. Sicela weqe lesi sigaba noma uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
serviceUnavailable.banner: Isevisi ye-1UpHealth ayitholakali okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.

communicationError.title: Iphutha Lokuxhumana
communicationError.message: Asikwazi ukuxhuma ku-1UpHealth ngalesi sikhathi. Sicela weqe lesi sigaba noma uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
communicationError.banner: Iphutha ukuxhumana ne-1UpHealth. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.

unknownError.title: Iphutha Elingaziwa
unknownError.message: Asikwazi ukuxhuma ku-1UpHealth ngalesi sikhathi. Sicela weqe lesi sigaba noma uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
unknownError.banner: Kwenzeke iphutha elingaziwa. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.

ehrRedirectModal.title: Konke kwenziwe
ehrRedirectModal.label: Usuqedile ukungena ngemvume kule akhawunti yomhlinzeki wezempilo. Sicela ubuyele ku-app lapho uqale khona le nqubo.
